title: Create: Re-Refined
description: QOL stuff and old create stuff (idk i was just messing around)
body:
Create: Re-Refined adds:
- The recipe for chromatic compound:
- 1 polished rose quartz, 1 powdered obsidian, 1 glowstone dust in a superheated mixer.
- A recipe for glowstone:
- 1 glow ink sac, 4 netherrack in a mixer.
- A recipe for budding amethyst: 
- 4 amethyst shards, 1 bucket of water in a heated mixer.
- A recipe for gilded blackstone:
- 1 crushed raw gold, 2 blackstone in a heated mixer.
(can you tell i like mixing stuff)
- A recipe for crimson logs:
- Haunting acacia logs.
- A recipe for warped logs:
- Haunting dark oak logs.
(if you wash either crimson or warped logs you get the logs you haunted back)
(it's logs only, im too lazy to do wood as well)
- A recipe for netherite upgrade templates:
- Press netherrack
- Deploy netherite scrap
- Press again
- Deploy Diamond block
- Deploy Netherrack
- Press again again
- hehehe it's a 33.333% chance of success
-  A recipe for the Creative Motor:
-   abn
-   bcd
-   nde
-   a = shaft
-   b = lapis sheet (pressing 1 lapis)
-   c = refined radiance (1 chromatic compound thrown in a beacon beam or surrounded by glowstone (will need more glowstone to be placed where the glowstone it "eats" was))
-   d = iron block
-   e = shadow steel (1 chromatic compound thrown in the end void)
-   n = nothing
